'''''Olinor''''' was a [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B escort frigate]] in the service to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. She arrived at space station [[DS 5]], presumably to stop Admiral Harkov's capture during the [[Battle for Honor]]. Instead she withdrew, losing a few [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]] to Imperial Ace [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] in the process. What became of it afterwards was unknown.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}
